query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM questions) as totalQuestions,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM responses r JOIN organizations o ON r.organizationId = o.id WHERE o.slug = 'radone-munson') as totalResponses,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments f JOIN organizations o ON f.organizationId = o.id WHERE o.slug = 'radone-munson') as totalFiles;

  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM responses r JOIN organizations o ON r.organizationId = o.id WHERE o.slug = 'radone-munson') as totalResponses,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments f JOIN organizations o ON f.organizationId = o.id WHERE o.slug = 'radone-munson') as totalFiles;
